mapper.update: UPDATE tb_book SET delete_yn = 'Y', delete_date = NOW() WHERE book_no = #{bookNo}
mapper.select: SELECT book_no, book_title, book_author, book_publisher, regist_date, delete_yn, delete_date FROM tb_book WHERE book_no = #{bookNo} AND delete_yn = 'N'

SELECT book_no, book_title, book_author, book_publisher, regist_date FROM tb_book WHERE delete_yn = 'N'
AND book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND book_author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND book_publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY book_no DESC LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{pageUnit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_book WHERE delete_yn = 'N'
AND book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND book_author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND book_publisher LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
